canonical.title: Upgrading a personal Obsidian workflow in 2026

siblings.title: Low-friction capture & AI-assisted backfill
siblings.summary: How to lower capture friction across desktop, mobile, web, voice — and how to run AI tag/metadata backfill across an existing vault in 2026.

siblings.title: Frontmatter & tagging schemas for extraction
siblings.summary: How to design Obsidian YAML frontmatter and tag taxonomies in 2026 so external tools can reliably extract, query, and validate the metadata.

siblings.title: Knowledge-base patterns for a technical vault
siblings.summary: What actually works for a technical Obsidian vault in 2026: hybrid PARA+Zettel skeleton, Properties-first metadata, daily-note capture, MOCs over deep folders, and a small high-value plugin set.

siblings.title: Automated media tracking (books / movies / series)
siblings.summary: Pick a tracking hub per medium (Hardcover for books, Simkl for film/TV), automate capture with Readwise + CrossWatch, and pull into Obsidian via Media DB or Book Search plugins.

siblings.title: Selective publishing to GitHub Pages or equivalents
siblings.summary: Pick the opt-in (whitelist) frontmatter pattern over draft-style opt-out; Quartz + ExplicitPublish is the closest free match to Obsidian Publish.

siblings.title: AI plugins for in-vault retrieval & summarization
siblings.summary: Pick Smart Connections for local-first retrieval, Copilot for polished vault chat with optional Plus tier, Smart Composer for Cursor-style edits, Khoj for cross-device self-hosted second-brain. Text Generator and the small ai-summary plugins cover dedicated summarization.

sources.title: Obsidian 1.9.0 changelog (Bases as core plugin)
sources.claim: Obsidian 1.9.0 (May 2025) introduced Bases as a core plugin and broke deprecated singular property forms (tag/alias/cssclass).

sources.title: Obsidian Dataview is dead, long live Bases
sources.claim: Dataview has gone effectively unmaintained for over a year while Bases ships regular improvements.

sources.title: Bases plugin overview — PracticalPKM
sources.claim: Bases reads only YAML frontmatter and silently ignores the inline `key:: value` Dataview idiom.

sources.title: Steph Ango's vault — kepano
sources.claim: kepano organizes via a `categories` property and reusable property names so values stay queryable across categories; 50+ category templates.

sources.title: Obsidian Help — Properties
sources.claim: Properties has no nested objects; flat keys only.

sources.title: Obsidian Web Clipper — Interpreter
sources.claim: Web Clipper Interpreter does LLM template-fill of summary/tags/author at clip time.

sources.title: AI Tagger Universe
sources.claim: AI Tagger Universe writes AI-generated tags into note frontmatter, supports 15+ LLM providers, and offers whole-vault batch backfill against an existing tag list.

sources.title: Quartz — ExplicitPublish plugin
sources.claim: Quartz `ExplicitPublish` filter only emits notes with `publish: true` frontmatter — the opt-in whitelist.

sources.title: Copilot for Obsidian — local Copilot guide
sources.claim: Copilot ships a documented Ollama path with `localhost:11434` adapter and the `OLLAMA_ORIGINS=app://obsidian.md*` CORS workaround.

sources.title: Forum — Alternatives to Smart Connections
sources.claim: Running Smart Connections + Copilot Vault QA + Smart Composer RAG simultaneously double-indexes the vault.

sources.title: Plugin: Journals (forum thread)
sources.claim: Journals is the actively-maintained replacement for Periodic Notes (which has been unmaintained since 2022).

sources.title: Quartz — Private pages
sources.claim: Even with `publish: true`, Quartz emits all non-markdown attachments — images, voice recordings, PDFs.

sources.title: Hardcover GraphQL API — Getting started
sources.claim: Hardcover exposes a free GraphQL API for book metadata and reading status.

sources.title: Simkl vs Trakt
sources.claim: Simkl offers unlimited free watchlist tracking; Trakt's free tier is capped at 100 watchlist+collection items in 2026.

sources.title: Guide: Obsidian Bases
sources.claim: A mandatory `type` property in YAML acts as the primary schema discriminator for Bases filtering.

sources.title: Official Obsidian Web Clipper
sources.claim: Official Obsidian Web Clipper has replaced Omnivore and most third-party clippers as the default 2026 capture path from the web.

sources.title: Letting a local LLM organize Obsidian notes
sources.claim: Workflow: AI Tagger Universe constrained to a hand-curated Tag List note plus Auto Note Mover for taxonomy-driven filing.

sources.title: mcp-obsidian
sources.claim: MCP server for Obsidian exposes `patch_content` and other tools — closest current path for calendar→daily-note retro-fill.

sources.title: Forum — Apple Intelligence on desktop
sources.claim: Electron exposes Apple Foundation Models on macOS 15.1+ but no dedicated Obsidian wrapper exists yet — open opportunity.

sources.title: Smart Connections
sources.claim: Smart Connections is the dominant local-first embeddings plugin for related-notes discovery.

sources.title: Copilot for Obsidian
sources.claim: Most-starred chat-with-vault plugin; Vault QA / RAG mode with Ollama and cloud-LLM support.

sources.title: Smart Composer
sources.claim: Cursor-style AI chat with @file/@vault context, Apply-Edit, MCP support; works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, LM Studio.

sources.title: Khoj — self-hostable AI second brain
sources.claim: Self-hostable AI second-brain across Obsidian, browser, desktop, phone, WhatsApp.

sources.title: Obsidian Media DB
sources.claim: Queries TMDB/OMDb/Open Library/Jikan/Steam/MusicBrainz for movies/series/anime/manga/books/games/music.

sources.title: Obsidian Book Search
sources.claim: Auto-creates book notes from Google Books with full metadata; integrates with Templater.

sources.title: CrossWatch
sources.claim: Self-hosted sync engine: keeps Plex/Jellyfin/Emby in sync with Simkl/Trakt/AniList/MDBList/Tautulli.

sources.title: Readwise → Obsidian
sources.claim: Official Readwise plugin auto-exports Kindle/Apple Books/Pocket/Twitter/PDF highlights into vault notes.

sources.title: Letterboxd Diary RSS Sync
sources.claim: Mirrors the last 50 Letterboxd diary entries into a single vault note via public RSS feed.

sources.title: QuickAdd
sources.claim: QuickAdd chains user scripts (e.g. BookFinder.js) into multi-step macros from a single hotkey.

sources.title: Templater
sources.claim: Templater + QuickAdd + daily-note inbox is the dominant 2026 in-Obsidian capture combo.

sources.title: Enveloppe
sources.claim: `share: true` opt-in publishing to MkDocs Material — material/docs aesthetic alternative to Quartz.

sources.title: Quartz v4
sources.claim: Closest free analogue to Obsidian Publish; ships graph view and backlinks.

sources.title: Whisper Obsidian plugin
sources.claim: Voice transcription via Whisper for longer captures.
